message:
feat(bundler): implement bundle packaging with blob verification

- Add BundlePackage struct with build/verify/serialize methods
- Add BundleBlob for content-addressed blob storage
- Implement binary format MSBUNDLE1 for distribution
- Add missing_blobs helper for incremental sync
- Rename collect_files to collect_files_for_bundle for clarity
- Export additional types from bundler module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
